description: A lightweight, concealable bullet resistant vest.  It will reliably protect against anything up to 9x19mm, but will struggle against tougher rounds like .45 ACP or .357 Magnum.

An improved iteration of a flexible, bullet-resistant vest that originally suffered from reliability issues.  Reliably protects against 5.56x45mm rounds while being less cumbersome than normal hard ballistic armor.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.
//: Ceramic disks inside block addition of steel plating modification

description: A lamellar Kevlar vest, providing modest protection from pistol rounds up to .40 S&W.  It was designed to slot in multiple small ceramic disks to improve bullet resistance.
A Modular Bullet Resistant Vest.  It has pouches for extra armor inserts, but even without them it will protect against anything up to .40 S&W.  It has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.

A Modular Bullet Resistant Vest.  Ceramic plates have been inserted to improve its protection, protecting against anything up to 7.62x51mm at the expense of moderate encumbrance, and being less durable than other plate options.  It has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A Modular Bullet Resistant Vest.  Hardened steel plates have been inserted, reliably negating anything up to 7.62x51mm at the cost of a great deal of weight and loss of flexibility.  It has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A Modular Bullet Resistant Vest.  Its armor pouches have steel plates in them, protecting against 5.56x45mm but making the vest much heavier and encumbering.  It has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A Modular Bullet Resistant Vest.  Its armor pouches have superalloy plating in them, protecting against anything up to 5.56x45mm with marginal flexibility loss and additional weight.  It has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A military ballistic vest rated for .40 S&W, modified with additional protective panels to improve coverage at the expense of encumbrance.  Made and used by military remnants to provide robust protection against the new threats of the cataclysm, it has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.

A military ballistic vest with additional protective panels, improving coverage at the expense of encumbrance.  Ceramic plates have been inserted to improve its protection, protecting against anything up to 7.62x51mm at the expense of moderate encumbrance, and being less durable than other plate options.  Made and used by military remnants to provide robust protection against the new threats of the cataclysm, it has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A military ballistic vest with additional protective panels, improving coverage at the expense of encumbrance.  Hardened steel plates have been inserted, reliably negating anything up to 7.62x51mm at the cost of a great deal of weight and loss of flexibility.  Made and used by military remnants to provide robust protection against the new threats of the cataclysm, it has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A military ballistic vest with additional protective panels, improving coverage at the expense of encumbrance.  Its armor pouches have steel plates in them, protecting against 5.56x45mm but making the vest much heavier and encumbering.  Made and used by military remnants to provide robust protection against the new threats of the cataclysm, it has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A military ballistic vest with additional protective panels, improving coverage at the expense of encumbrance.  Its armor pouches have superalloy plating in them, protecting against anything up to 5.56x45mm with marginal flexibility loss and additional weight.  Made and used by military remnants to provide robust protection against the new threats of the cataclysm, it has four pouches capable of carrying magazines.  Damaged plates will require it to be disassembled to replace.

A flotation vest, cut open and tightly packed with sand or earth as improvised ballistic protection.  Incredibly cumbersome, it won't do much but it'll keep your organs inside your torso against anything up to .40 S&W.
//: Mono-material as it likely would need to be taken apart to repair, plus the material of the vest is less of a factor on resistances.

description: Cumbersome body armor forged from hardened steel plating.  Very heavy, but able to take considerable punishment, laughing off anything up to .44 Magnum.
//: 44-45 kg is the commonly cited value for the complete set, possible figure of 9 kg for the helm.

description: A cumbersome full-face helm forged from hardened steel plating.  Very heavy, but able to take considerable punishment, laughing off anything up to .44 Magnum.
